name: Myhome Real Estate Development Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Myhome Real Estate Development Group Co., Ltd. engages in the development of real estate properties in China. It also develops urban lands; provides urban and rural construction services; and constructs fabricated buildings and industrial towns, as well as engages in agriculture business. The company was formerly known as Milord Real Estate Development Group CO., LTD. and changed its name to Myhome Real Estate Development Group Co., Ltd. in February 2014. Myhome Real Estate Development Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1989 and is based in Wuhan, China.
